24:48 â December 30, 2024
Update to the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated
the
Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
, as announced in the
2025 Indicative Pricing for Payment and Digital Services
notice published September 27, 2024. Additional changes are described
here
.
The Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only. The fee changes come into effect January 1, 2025.
